fea.part_description: The part is made of 15CrMo chromium-molybdenum alloy steel and has an overall rectangular shape. It features several characteristics: General Shape: Rectangular. Two through holes located along the central axis of the short sides, symmetrically positioned on both sides of the central axis. Two rectangular channels located on both sides of the central axis of the long sides, symmetrically placed. Four rectangular grooves positioned at the right angle formed by the intersection of the two rectangular channels. A flat reference surface ensuring tight integration with other components. Surface Treatment: Matte. Colour: White.

features.description: Main reference flat surface (top/bottom), area ≈ large
Through hole #1, central axis short side, left
Through hole #2, central axis short side, right
Rectangular pocket — 4 pockets at slot intersections
Four rectangular pockets at slot intersections

raw_stp.summary:
This part has 32 faces.
This part has 4 feature sets: flat_surface, through_hole×2, rectangular_through_slot×2, rectangular_pocket×4.

raw_image.image_text:
1. General Shape: Rectangular block with multiple machined features symmetrically
   distributed along the central axes of the long and short sides.

2. Feature Description:
   - Two through holes: Located along the central axis of the short sides,
     symmetrically positioned on both sides of the central axis.
   - Two rectangular channels: Located on both sides of the central axis of the
     long sides, symmetrically placed. Pass through the entire part length.
   - Four rectangular grooves: Positioned at the right angle formed by the
     intersection of the two rectangular channels. Used for fixing during assembly.
   - Flat reference surface: Main top and bottom faces ensuring tight integration
     with mating components.
   - Chamfers / rounded corners on all external edges.

3. Surface Treatment: Matte
4. Colour: White (likely engineering plastic or light alloy)
5. Other Features: Symmetric layout suggests the part functions as a sliding-fit
   assembly bracket.

macro_sequence.reason: Machine the basic shape first — provides stable reference for all subsequent operations.
Through holes are simpler features; drill after reference surface; can reuse same drill bit.
Symmetric hole — process in same setup as hole #1.
Slots pass through entire part; machine after through holes (holes serve as datum).
Symmetric slot — process symmetrically in same setup as slot #1.
Pockets at slot intersections require slots to be finished first as reference.

mppa.sequence_notes: Basic shape first, then holes, then slots, then pockets. Surface treatment applied last. Deburring after rough stages.

ordered_features.description: Main reference flat surface (top/bottom), area ≈ large

sppa.notes: Process chains from knowledge graph. Chains selected for Ra=0.8-1.6 μm, IT7-IT8 requirements.

final_route.operation: Processing the Basic Shape of the Workpiece - Rough Milling
final_route.notes: Establish reference surface; remove bulk material quickly.

final_route.operation: Processing Two Rectangular Channels - Rough Milling
final_route.notes: Both slots in one setup — symmetric clamping.

final_route.operation: Processing Four Rectangular Pockets - Rough Milling
final_route.notes: All four pockets in one setup.
Remove burrs from rough milling before semi-finish.

final_route.operation: Processing the Basic Shape - Semi-Finishing Milling
final_route.notes: Achieve IT9 accuracy on reference surface.

final_route.operation: Processing Two Rectangular Channels - Semi-Finishing Milling
Processing Four Rectangular Pockets - Semi-Finishing Milling

final_route.notes: Remove chips and coolant residue before finish milling.

final_route.operation: Processing the Basic Shape - Finishing Milling
Processing Two Rectangular Channels - Finishing Milling
Processing Four Rectangular Pockets - Finishing Milling

final_route.notes: Drill both holes in one setup.

final_route.operation: Processing Two Through Holes - Precision Boring

final_route.notes: Check all dimensions and surface quality against drawing.

poea.route_summary: The final route follows rough milling → semi-finish milling → finish milling → drilling → boring, grouping all operations of the same stage together to minimise machine and tool changes. Deburring and cleaning steps are inserted at stage transitions. The efficiency score Y = 42, substantially outperforming the typical route (Y = −10).
poea.efficiency_report:
============================================================
Process Route Efficiency Evaluation Report
============================================================

Rank 1: ROUTE_1 — Grouped by machining stage (rough→semi-finish→finish→hole)
  Machine changes (a): 8
  Tool changes    (b): 9
  Efficiency score Y = 100.0 - 8.0×8 - 3.0×9 = 9.0
  Steps (14):
     1. Rough Milling                  | Gantry Milling Machine (Doosan BM2045) | Carbide End Mill (Kyocera PR1535)
     2. Rough Milling                  | Gantry Milling Machine (Doosan BM2740) | Carbide End Mill (Mitsubishi APX4000)
     3. Rough Milling                  | Gantry Milling Machine (Doosan BM2740) | Carbide End Mill (Mitsubishi APX4000)
     4. Deburring                      | Manual (Manual) | Deburring Tool (Standard)
     5. Semi-Finishing Milling         | Horizontal Milling Machine (OKUMA MB-5000H) | HSS End Mill (Kennametal KSEM)
     6. Semi-Finishing Milling         | Horizontal Milling Machine (OKUMA MB-5000H) | HSS End Mill (Kyocera MEGACOAT)
     7. Semi-Finishing Milling         | Horizontal Milling Machine (OKUMA MB-5000H) | HSS End Mill (Kyocera MEGACOAT)
     8. Cleaning                       | Manual (Manual) | Cleaning Tool (Standard)
     9. Finishing Milling              | CNC Milling Machine (DMG MORI NHX 5000) | Tungsten Carbide End Mill (Sandvik CoroMill 316)
    10. Finishing Milling              | CNC Milling Machine (DMG MORI NHX 5000) | Tungsten Carbide End Mill (Sandvik CoroMill 316)
    11. Finishing Milling              | CNC Milling Machine (DMG MORI NHX 5000) | Tungsten Carbide End Mill (Sandvik CoroMill 316)
    12. Drilling (Reaming)             | Radial Drill (Z3040) | Drill Bit (Kyocera KSD30)
    13. Precision Boring               | Boring Machine (TPX6111B) | Carbide Precision Boring Tool (Mitsubishi BORING)
    14. Final Inspection               | CMM (Zeiss CONTURA) | Probe (Renishaw)
